mapper.select: select * from course_final_grade where course_id = #{courseId} and student_id = #{studentId} limit 1
select cfg.final_score from course_final_grade cfg join course c on c.id = cfg.course_id where c.id = #{courseId} and c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and c.status = 1 and cfg.final_score is not null

select u.id as student_id, coalesce(nullif(trim(u.real_name), ''), u.username) as student_name, cfg.assignment_score, cfg.checkin_score, cfg.resource_score, cfg.exam_score, cfg.final_score, cfg.calculated_at from course c join course_member cm on cm.course_id = c.id and cm.member_role = 'STUDENT' and cm.status = 1 join sys_user u on u.id = cm.user_id and u.status = 1 left join course_final_grade cfg on cfg.course_id = c.id and cfg.student_id = u.id where c.id = #{courseId} and c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and c.status = 1 order by student_name asc, u.id asc
